description: Run 3 baseline: production passes (cleanup + FSDP bucketing/reorder + regional Inductor + cudagraph), no SAC, no extra custom passes
async_tensor_parallel_pass after bucketing: 99 'no producer matmul' skips, -1.9% throughput
async_TP first in compile_time_passes: 0 fusions (DTensor redistribute inserts view/permute breaking matcher)
bucket_all_reduce after FSDP bucketing: lint fail (FSDP overlap moves AR-wait consumers earlier, breaking topology)
bucket_all_reduce before FSDP bucketing: same lint fail, upstream topology bug not position-dependent
2-layer FSDP bucket plan: +0.94% avg over 3 runs (7239/7214/7236), bitwise PASS
SwiGLU regional Inductor (128 nodes tagged): +0.14% in noise, bitwise PASS - confirms pointwise fusion is bitwise-safe
Broad pointwise tag (1328 nodes, silu/mul/add/sub/_to_copy/view_as_complex): -0.51%, Inductor can't codegen complex ops
auto_overlap_bucketing (schedule_overlap_bucketing): +0.90% over 2-layer manual (7291/7305/7287), +1.84% over Run3 baseline
overlap_fsdp_ag_rs_pass unconditional: -0.27% (auto-bucketer already hides most AG)
schedule_overlap_bucketing tuned (memory 8GB, in_flight 16GB, compute_mul 1.5, fusion_regions): -0.74%, bucket count capped by pre-bucket FSDP
async TP between normalize+bucket: 356 'no producer matmul' skips, 0 fusions, -2.1%
